html:query.declare: <PARAMS WF="" MODE="OWNER" SIZE="8" PAGE="1" fil="E,R" fil2="" fil3="XXX" oi_instance="" DEBUG="0" DEBUGETTY="acenci" />
html:query.name: qry_report

qry:attribute.name: fil-estado
qry:attribute.value: '(([I].c_estado_ej=\\\'R\\\' and [I].f_advertencia>={Now()}) or ([I].c_estado_ej=\\\'R\\\' and isNull([I].f_vencimiento)) or ([I].c_estado_ej=\\\'R\\\' and [I].f_vencimiento<{Now()})'+iif(@fil-estado='',')',' or '+@fil-estado+')')

qry:select.name: ADMIN-COUNT
ADMIN-LIST
INSTANCE-COLUMN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select W.oi_wf, W.c_wf, W.d_wf, W.e_version, I.oi_instance, I.c_instance, I.d_instance, I.c_estado_wf, I.c_estado_ej, I.f_advertencia, I.f_vencimiento, I.f_inicio, I.f_fin, I.d_owner_ayn, I.d_owner_mail, I.d_owner_tel, I.d_owner_rol from wrk01_wf as W, wrk02_instances as I join W.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf where I.oi_instance in ({%= string($SOURCE/TASK/@I-id) %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INSTANCIA-ESTADO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select E.d_estado, E.c_color from wrk01_estados as E where E.oi_wf={$SOURCE/@W-id} and E.c_estado={$SOURCE/@I-estado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INSTANCIA-ADD-COLUMN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select V.c_var_group, V.e_valor_1, V.e_valor_2, V.e_valor_3, V.e_valor_4, V.e_valor_5, V.c_valor_1, V.c_valor_2, V.c_valor_3, V.c_valor_4, V.c_valor_5,V.c_valor_6, V.c_valor_7, V.c_valor_8, V.c_valor_9, V.c_valor_10, V.n_valor_1, V.n_valor_2, V.n_valor_3, V.d_valor_1, V.d_valor_2, V.d_valor_3 from WRK02_VALS as V where V.oi_instance={$SOURCE/@I-id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ADD-FIELDS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_wf as WP
where WF.c_wf=WP.c_wf and WF.e_version_pub=WP.e_version and WF.l_automatica=0 and WP.c_wf = {$SOURCE/@WF}
UNION
select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WP
where WP.l_automatica=0 and e_version_pub=0 and WP.c_wf = {$SOURCE/@WF}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: CAMPOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
select WG.c_var_group, WG.d_var_group, WV.c_var, WV.d_var, WV.c_type, WV.c_column, WV.c_column_desc, WV.e_order from WRK01_GROUPS as WG, WRK01_VARS as WV where WG.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/@oi_wf} and (WG.c_mode = \'MAIN\' or WG.c_mode = \'HIST\') and WG.oi_var_group=WV.oi_var_group and WV.l_show_console=1 order by e_order ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TASK-COUNT
TASK-LIST
THREAD-COLUMN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_thread, T.f_ejecucion, T.f_advertencia, T.f_vencimiento, N.d_label from wrk02_threads as T, wrk01_nodes as N join T.oi_node inner N.oi_node where T.oi_thread in ({%= string($SOURCE/TASK/@T-id) %}) ')/ROWS/ROW
